scripts.check: npm run check:format && npm run check:python
scripts.check:python: uv run ruff check .github/workflows/process_data.py && uv run ruff format --check .github/workflows/process_data.py && uv run ty check .github/workflows/process_data.py
scripts.install:ruby: bundle config set --local path 'vendor/bundle' && bundle install
scripts.install:all: npm run install:ruby && npm run install:python
